profile: Computer science student at Université Côte d’Azur (B.Sc. expected in summer 2026); Erasmus exchange at Universidad Complutense de Madrid. Focused on high-performance algorithms, robust systems, and automation, with a strong interest in machine learning reliability and related tooling. Designed enterprise data synchronization workflows and research-level ML foundations.

education.description: Active participant at the Facultad de Informática, with a focus on advanced computing and international collaboration.
Ranked 5th in class (previous academic year). Core coursework in algorithms, data structures, and software architecture.

highlights: Designed a three-layer service to synchronize DHL datasets with client systems.
Automated file reconciliation to reduce manual errors at scale.
Improved data quality checks for high-volume batch processing.
Mentored undergraduate cohorts in mathematics and computer science.
Prepared exercises in algorithms and data structures.

customSections.title: Robustness & Algorithmic Projects
customSections.content:
• HetGNN & Self-Healing: PyTorch system designed to preserve GNN stability under structural shocks, with dual-ascent optimization, recovery metrics, ablation tracking, and stress-test suites.
  • RandLin Diagnostics: Matrix-free checks for randomized linear algebra estimators, producing calibration and variance reports.
  • DetGraph: CLI for detecting structural changes in graphs, with temporal drift tracking via spectral statistics.

customSections.title: Systems & Tools
customSections.content:
• Resumake: TypeScript/React resume generator optimized for printing, with A4 overflow detection and sharing.
  • Riddle Game: 2D Java game built with an ECS-style architecture and supporting tooling.

customSections.title: Certificates & Distinctions
customSections.content:
• HTE geNIUS Program: Italian Institute of Technology (biotechnology strategy and research).
  • HackerRank: Java and problem-solving certifications.
  • Community AI/ML Course (2021).
